ddls:
CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user's role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the role is a default role */,
  "can_create_courses" INTEGER /* Indicates if users with this role can create courses */,
  "can_manage_roles" INTEGER /* Indicates if users with this role can manage roles and permissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "courses" (
  "course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course */,
  "course_name" TEXT /* Name of the course */,
  "instructor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the instructor for the course */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the course */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the course */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the course was last updated */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department to which the course belongs */,
  "semester" TEXT /* Semester of the course */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the course is held */,
  "is_online" INTEGER /* Indicates if the course is online */,
  "max_students" INTEGER /* Maximum number of students allowed in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_courses_instructor_id FOREIGN KEY ("instructor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_courses" (
  "user_course_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-course relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role within the course */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the user was enrolled in the course */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user's enrollment (e.g., active, dropped) */,
  "is_primary_instructor" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is the primary instructor for the course */,
  "is_enrolled" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user is currently enrolled in the course */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_courses_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "is_system_level" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is at the system level or course level */,
  "is_default" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is a default permission for a role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role-permission relationship */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicates if the permission is an override for the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_role_permissions_permission_id FOREIGN KEY ("permission_id") REFERENCES permissions ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcements" (
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each announcement */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the announcement belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the announcement */,
  "content" TEXT /* Content of the announcement */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the announcement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the announcement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the announcement was last updated */,
  "is_pinned" INTEGER /* Indicates if the announcement is pinned */,
  "is_private" INTEGER /* Indicates if the announcement is private */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("announcement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcements_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "announcement_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "announcement_id" INTEGER /* ID of the announcement being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the announcement */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the announcement was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to access the announcement (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the announcement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_announcement_access_announcement_id FOREIGN KEY ("announcement_id") REFERENCES announcements ("announcement_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the assignment belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the assignment */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the assignment */,
  "due_date" TEXT /* Due date of the assignment */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the assignment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was last updated */,
  "is_group_assignment" INTEGER /* Indicates if the assignment is a group assignment */,
  "group_size" INTEGER /* Maximum group size for group assignments */,
  "is_late_submission_allowed" INTEGER /* Indicates if late submissions are allowed */,
  "late_submission_penalty" REAL /* Penalty for late submissions */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignments_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "assignment_submissions" (
  "submission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment submission */,
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the assignment being submitted */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student who submitted the assignment */,
  "submission_date" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was submitted */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the submitted file */,
  "grade" REAL /* Grade received for the assignment */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback from the grader */,
  "graded_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who graded the assignment */,
  "graded_at" TEXT /* Date and time the assignment was graded */,
  "is_late_submission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the submission was late */,
  "late_submission_penalty_applied" REAL /* Penalty applied for late submission */,
  "submission_status" TEXT /* Status of the submission (e.g., submitted, graded) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("submission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_graded_by FOREIGN KEY ("graded_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_assignment_id FOREIGN KEY ("assignment_id") REFERENCES assignments ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_assignment_submissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user performing the activity */,
  "activity_type" TEXT /* Type of the activity (e.g., login, logout, create announcement) */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date and time the activity occurred */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course related to the activity */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user performing the activity */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device used to perform the activity (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "activity_status" TEXT /* Status of the activity (e.g., success, failure) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "course_materials" (
  "material_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each course material */,
  "course_id" INTEGER /* ID of the course the material belongs to */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the course material */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the course material */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the material */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the material */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the material was last updated */,
  "is_required" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is required for the course */,
  "is_optional" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is optional for the course */,
  "is_external" INTEGER /* Indicates if the material is from an external source */,
  "external_source" TEXT /* Source of the external material (e.g., URL) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("material_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_course_id FOREIGN KEY ("course_id") REFERENCES courses ("course_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_course_materials_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
